data.title: IwaiCosmo Holdings Forecasts Record Profits on Surge in U.S. Equity Revenue
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

IwaiCosmo Holdings, Inc. ( (JP:8707) ) has issued an update.

IwaiCosmo Holdings reported preliminary consolidated results for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026, showing a strong jump in operating revenue to ¥32.26 billion and profit attributable to owners of parent to ¥10.44 billion. Earnings per share rose to ¥444.61, up 55.3% from the prior year, reflecting a substantial improvement in profitability.

The company said revenue grew 25.3% year on year, primarily driven by higher U.S. equity-related income, helping operating, ordinary, and net profit all surpass last year’s levels and reach record highs. Ordinary profit has now remained positive for 54 consecutive quarters, underscoring the resilience of its securities business despite market volatility, though management continues to refrain from issuing earnings forecasts due to sensitivity to economic and market conditions.

More about IwaiCosmo Holdings, Inc.

IwaiCosmo Holdings Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based financial services group listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market under stock code 8707. Through its core unit Iwai Cosmo Securities, the group focuses on securities brokerage and investment services, with a notable emphasis on trading in U.S. equities as a key earnings driver.

Average Trading Volume: 128,553

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen87.5B

data.title: Core Concept Technologies Weighs Implications of SIGMAXYZ Share Acquisition
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Core Concept Technologies Inc. ( (JP:4371) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Core Concept Technologies has disclosed that it became aware of SIGMAXYZ Holdings’ acquisition of its shares only after SIGMAXYZ’s public announcement and had not received prior formal notice. While the two companies share a general understanding about potential cooperation, they have not yet agreed on any capital or business alliance.

The board of Core Concept Technologies plans to carefully evaluate any formal proposal from SIGMAXYZ, particularly if the stake rises to a level that triggers equity-method accounting and affects management strategy or share liquidity. The company emphasized it will continue pursuing its existing business operations and performance targets for the fiscal year ending December 2026, while making any required disclosures in a timely manner.

More about Core Concept Technologies Inc.

Core Concept Technologies Inc., listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Growth Market, operates in the technology sector and is headquartered in Tokyo. The company focuses on digital solutions and related services, targeting growth through innovation and the enhancement of corporate value for its shareholders.

Pure Foods Tasmania Ltd. ( (AU:PFT) ) has issued an announcement.

Pure Foods Tasmania Limited has called its Annual General Meeting for 21 May 2026 in Hobart, where shareholders will receive the 2025 financial, directors’ and auditors’ reports and vote on key governance matters, including the adoption of the remuneration report and the re-election of director Malcolm McAully. Investors will also be asked to ratify a prior capital raising and approve several proposed share and option issues, including consideration shares linked to the Elato transaction and placements to an investor referred to as BFA, moves that collectively refresh placement capacity and support the company’s funding and acquisition strategy, with potential dilution and strategic implications for existing shareholders.

data.title: Alien Metals flags high-priority DHEM drill target at Elizabeth Hill JV
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Alien Metals Ltd ( (GB:UFO) ) has issued an update.

Alien Metals has highlighted an update from its joint venture partner West Coast Silver on the Elizabeth Hill Silver Project in Western Australia, where Alien holds a 30% interest. West Coast Silver has identified a new down-hole electromagnetic conductor about 50 metres east of the historic Elizabeth Hill Mine at a depth of roughly 110 metres and will move an on-site diamond drill rig immediately to test this high-priority target.

The DHEM anomaly, modelled as a discrete conductive plate aligned with a prior silver intersection and a favourable geological contact, represents the first use of electromagnetics at Elizabeth Hill and could materially expand the project’s resource potential if mineralisation is confirmed. The work is part of a broader program of drilling and geophysics scheduled through May 2026, with assay results from current reverse circulation and diamond drilling expected to be reported progressively in the second quarter, potentially influencing the valuation of Alien’s joint venture interest and its broader Pilbara portfolio.

Spark’s Take on UFO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, UFO is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and negative free cash flow) despite improved 2024 loss and cash-burn trends and low leverage. Technicals are comparatively strong with price above key moving averages and positive MACD, while valuation remains constrained by the company’s loss-making profile and lack of dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on UFO stock, click here.

More about Alien Metals Ltd

Alien Metals Limited is a mining exploration and development company listed on London’s AIM market, pursuing a balanced strategy of advancing and monetising its portfolio through technical work, project development and partnerships. Its principal focus is the 90%-owned Hancock Iron Ore Project in Western Australia’s Pilbara, which hosts a JORC-compliant resource and targets a 2Mtpa operation over 10 years, while it also retains minority interests in advanced precious and base metal assets including the Munni Munni PGM system and the Elizabeth Hill Silver Project.

Average Trading Volume: 122,039,032

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £13.94M

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Epigral Ltd ( (IN:EPIGRAL) ) has provided an update.

Epigral Limited has launched a postal ballot process to seek shareholder approval for certain special business resolutions through remote e-voting. In line with Ministry of Corporate Affairs circulars and SEBI listing rules, the company will conduct the exercise entirely electronically, using CDSL’s e-voting platform and sending notices via email to eligible members as of the April 10, 2026 cut-off date.

The e-voting window will run from April 20 to May 19, 2026, with members required to record their assent or dissent electronically by the close of the period. The move underscores the company’s continued reliance on digital governance mechanisms and standardized compliance practices, aiming to ensure broad shareholder participation while maintaining transparency and regulatory alignment.

More about Epigral Ltd

Epigral Limited is an India-based listed company headquartered in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. It operates in the industrial and manufacturing space, serving a broad shareholder base through listings on both the National Stock Exchange of India and BSE, under the symbol EPIGRAL and scrip code 543332 respectively.

data.title: Swan Corp Seeks Shareholder Nod via E-Vote for New Independent Directors
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Swan Corp ( (IN:SWANCORP) ) has issued an announcement.

Swan Corp Limited has initiated a postal ballot process to seek shareholder approval for the appointment of Ms. Bhagwati Sharma and Mr. Ashish Chhabria as non-executive independent directors. The company has dispatched the postal ballot notice electronically to eligible shareholders, who can cast their votes exclusively through remote e-voting between April 20 and May 19, 2026.

The voting process is being conducted in compliance with the Companies Act, SEBI listing regulations and MCA guidelines, with NSDL engaged to provide the e-voting platform and an external scrutinizer appointed to oversee the ballot. Results are expected on or before May 21, 2026, and the board changes, if approved, would further strengthen Swan Corp’s governance framework and independent oversight for investors.

More about Swan Corp

Swan Corp Limited, formerly known as Swan Energy Limited, is an Indian listed company with roots dating back to 1909 and a registered office in Mumbai’s Ballard Estate. The company is listed on both the National Stock Exchange of India and BSE, and it communicates with shareholders through digital channels and stock exchange filings in line with SEBI’s disclosure norms.

data.title: JAPEX Warns Middle East Tensions to Raise LNG Costs and Hit Iraq Oil Revenue
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Japan Petroleum Exploration Co ( (JP:1662) ) has provided an update.

Japan Petroleum Exploration Co. says escalating tensions in the Middle East and a de facto blockade of the Strait of Hormuz have forced it to procure two first-quarter fiscal 2026 LNG cargoes on the spot market instead of from the Persian Gulf. This substitution is expected to significantly raise LNG procurement costs, although the company stresses that alternative arrangements mean there is no immediate risk to natural gas or power supply for its Japanese customers.

The company’s participation in Iraq’s Garraf oil field has also been hit, with production and shipments suspended following a force majeure declaration by the Iraqi government and no visibility on resumption, eliminating expected revenue from the project. While higher crude prices and a weaker yen are supporting revenue, JAPEX warns that unplanned LNG spot purchases, the Garraf shutdown and tight supply of chemical products for domestic fields could sharply erode profits, with detailed impacts to be reflected in its fiscal 2027 forecast, though effects on fiscal 2026 results are expected to be minimal.

JAPEX is analyzing the financial implications of these disruptions and will update its earnings outlook once it can better gauge the trajectory of regional tensions and supply-chain conditions. The company says it will continue monitoring developments closely while prioritizing stable energy supply despite cost pressures and operational uncertainty in the Middle East.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:1662) stock is a Hold with a Yen980.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Japan Petroleum Exploration Co stock, see the JP:1662 Stock Forecast page.

More about Japan Petroleum Exploration Co

Japan Petroleum Exploration Co., Ltd. is a Japanese energy company engaged in exploration, production and procurement of oil and natural gas, including liquefied natural gas used as feedstock for gas supply and as fuel for power generation. The company also operates and supplies electricity through assets such as the Fukushima Natural Gas Power Plant and participates in overseas upstream projects like the Garraf oil field in Iraq.

Average Trading Volume: 3,793,833

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen613.3B
